containment_bridges.description: Maps appellation slugs (containment hierarchy nodes) to region slugs. Script checks each catch-all appellation's own slug first, then its ancestors (closest first), and uses the first bridge match.

name_patterns.description: Country-scoped regex patterns applied to appellation NAME (not slug). Tested against still-unattributed appellations after Pass 1. Each pattern is checked in order; first match wins.

direct_attributions.description: Explicit appellation_slug → region_slug for appellations not covered by containment or patterns.
